Explain the user benefit.

## Type

- [ ] New source added

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter still has `name: cari-tools` and a clear `description`
- [ ] Validated locally (`claude --plugin-dir ./plugins/cari-tools` and/or `claude plugin validate ./plugins/cari-tools`)
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed
